text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a fantastic performance in the Twinkle
Series, Grass Wonder has had an impressive first
three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A large milestone is now behind us. But one
peaceful day...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well then, everyone...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now that things have settled down, would all of
you like to join me on a hike in the mountains?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Say what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: As in mountain mountains?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be nice for us all to have a trip
together before El goes overseas.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is new, Grass being all
spur-of-the-moment.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It sounds like it'll be a lotta fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And you're doin' it all for me? I'm so so so so
touched! So grateful! So—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's just a little idea for everyone to make some lovely memories, that's all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Reeejected!
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want me along?
Are you sure you want me along?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But of course. Your presence is an absolute must,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can hardly wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well then, shall we head for the base of the
mountain?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's been ages since I saw Grass smile like
this.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... It irks me knowin' it's cuz she's been winnin'
like mad!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Though... it's true that a sunny sonrisa is what
suits Grass best.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But that said, I am SO wipin' that smirk off her
face eventually!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, will you, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C... c'mon everybody! We're gonna lose all the
daylight draggin' our feet like this! Let's run to
the mountain!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a race. I'm in.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Last one there's gotta carry all our bags!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The stakes have skyrocketed! That's a little scary,
Sei!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Get back hereeee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wha—?! E-everybody?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hmph! All right then!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't lose, do you hear me?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Everyone is just so competitive.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Your thoughts are written all over your
face.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Dear me... Hehehe.
choice_data_list: Aren't you going to chase after them?
Aren't you going to chase after them?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Not today, no.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Today... I want to savor each step along the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I leisurely take in the sights
along the green trail upward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each foot we lay upon the earth brings us another
step forward.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There is no path before me, only in my wake.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The first time I stepped onto the racetrack, I
knew it was where I should be.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I decided that if I were to press forward, I could
not allow myself to stop until I reached the very
top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: At first, I believed it would be straightforward.
choice_data_list:
But then you ran into twists and turns along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're exactly right.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was stumbling through my immaturity, caught up
by trivialities. I even got told off by my own
friend.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: With how slow my progress felt, there were some nights I wondered whether I even could reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But not any longer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I have Maruzen and Sei. Suzuka, El, and Spe,
too...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm surrounded by so many friends and
supporters... And most of all, Trainer, I have you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This is the path I was meant to tread, because I'm
the only one who can.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A path extending far into the distance, to a
destination only I can reach.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So... I will keep my head held high and take each
step with purpose.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: To reach the top!
